S&R Travel Blog
EN ES
← Back to Ecuador 2025
2025-12-24 Ecuador

Ecuador 2025

Christmas

We arrived in Ecuador early on December 24th, the day Christmas is celebrated.

Enjoying shrimp soup after arriving in Ecuador

That evening, we went to Sebastián’s Aunt Julia’s house to celebrate Christmas. We enjoyed seeing the aunts, uncles, and cousins and hearing updates on how everyone is doing. We brought fireworks and Roman Candles, which we set off with some of the kids there.

Sebastián & Rachel
With the family
Sebastián & Giovanna
With Grandma
With Aunt Julia

Christmas is also Sebastián’s Aunt Ana’s birthday. This year, her kids surprised her with a mariachi band! We snuck the band in when she was in the kitchen, and then when she came out they started singing for her. For the next few hours they led the party in music and dance.

The mariachi band

Time with Family & Friends

Sebastián’s parents are famous for their crab feasts. After getting to see Sebastián’s dad’s side of the family, his mom’s side came over for a crab lunch.

We also got to see many of Sebastián’s friends from high school. We talked, played games, and went to a Go Kart track!

While at the Go Kart place, we just happened to run into Christopher, a friend of Sebastián’s from doing math competitions in high school.

We had a lovely time with family. Lots of good conversations, delicious food, and a cute iguana visitor. We got to celebrate Giovanny’s employee’s 10 year anniversary at the company.

During down-time we also had fun playing virtual escape rooms (thank you, Jonathan!).

Going out for breakfast
At the restaurant
Bolon
10 year anniversary

One evening, Sebastián’s Uncle Leonardo, who is a farmer, brought over a whole leg of pork, which he had roasted himself.

It smelled incredible. Uncle Leonardo came in a taxi, and the poor taxi driver had to spend 40 minutes with the mouth-watering food there. It was only fair then that they gave him a plate too.

That one leg of pork served over twenty people, and was delicious!!

Serving the pork
Pork
Sebastián’s favourite photo!
Leonardo, Sebastián, Teresa
Sebastián is happy

Last Day

On New Year’s Eve, we had to head back home. We went out for bolon one last time, and then headed to the airport.
